parts.prompt: Identify the hybridization of the valence orbitals of the C atom in the 2 molecule.

required_elements: For the correct answer: Point 01 sp2

parts.prompt:
In the diagram provided, draw a SINGLE dashed line (----) to represent a strong hydrogen-
CH OH H CO
bonding attraction between one 3 molecule and one 2 molecule in the mixture.
CH OH H CO
rubric_criteria: For a correct diagram: Point 02 The diagram should show a dashed line between the O atom in one H CO molecule and the H atom in the −OH group of one CH OH molecule. See example response below.

parts.prompt:

CH
OH(l)
is present. Calculate the amount of thermal energy, in kJ, that was removed to
condense the 8.59 g of
CH
OH
(molar mass 32.04
g/mol
) at its boiling point.

required_elements: The proposed temperature should be in the range 181 K−254 K.
alternatives.correct_example: The proposed temperature should be in the range 181 K−254 K.
